case_title: VASILIKI SERVETA, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP vs. COX, LAURA et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ANY AND ALL CLAIMS BASED ON THAT PORTION OF PARAGRAPH 1 OF THE 30-DAY NOTICE (EXHIBIT 2 TO COMPLAINT) CONCERNING THE REMOVAL OF FIXTURES, INVENTORY AND OTHER TANGIBLE PROPERTY IN WHICH PLAINTIFF ASSERTS A SECURITY INTEREST
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF VASILIKI SERVETA, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $121.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $121.00
